metadata.description: Bug bounty programs with open submissions across three platforms. Focus on paid bounties, open scope, and no strict Signal requirements.

bugcrowd.note: Programs listed as 'Bug Bounty' (public) on bugcrowd.com/engagements. Many more programs available — this is a representative sample of open programs.

programs.name: T-Mobile
programs.scope_summary: Core: account.t-mobile.com, t-mobile.com, *.api.t-mobile.com, sprint.com, metrobyt-mobile.com. Mobile: T-Mobile iOS/Android, SyncUP DRIVE/KIDS/TRACKER, DIGITS. API endpoints across multiple services.
programs.bounty_range: Up to $133,700 (special targets) | P1 Core: $55,000 | P2 Core: $35,000 | Static rewards: $1,500 for subdomain takeover
programs.submission_method: Bugcrowd platform with custom X-Bug-Bounty header
programs.notes: Uses T-Mobile Severity Rating Flowchart (not CVSS/VRT). Loyalty program for repeat researchers. Subdomain takeovers $1,500 static.

programs.name: Tesla
programs.scope_summary: Web: *.tesla.com, *.teslamotors.com, *.solarcity.com, *.tesla.services, *.tesla.cn. Mobile: Tesla iOS/Android apps. Vehicle hardware you own.
programs.submission_method: Bugcrowd platform + vulnerabilityreporting@tesla.com for vehicle/energy hardware
programs.notes: Vehicle targets pay significantly more. Must register owned hardware before research. Avg payout lower due to many web submissions.

programs.name: Pinterest
programs.scope_summary: Web: *.pinterest.com, api.pinterest.com. Mobile: Pinterest iOS/Android/Lite. Browser extensions (Chrome, Edge, Firefox, Safari). Shuffles app. Open source at github.com/pinterest/.
programs.submission_method: Bugcrowd platform, requires @bugcrowdninja.com email for API developer enrollment
programs.notes: Strict & Non-Negotiable Rewards Caps. Uses Bugcrowd VRT. Requires business account + developer enrollment for API testing.

programs.name: Atlassian
programs.scope_summary: Cloud: Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket, Compass, Rovo, Atlas. Data Center: Jira, Confluence, Bitbucket, Crowd, Bamboo. Mobile: Jira Cloud/DC, Confluence Cloud/DC. Loom (recently acquired).
programs.bounty_range: Up to $12,000 per vulnerability (varies by product)
programs.notes: Focus areas: Cross Instance Data Leakage, RCE, SSRF, XSS, CSRF, SQLi, XXE, IDOR. Must use own test instances named bugbounty-test-<username>.atlassian.net.

programs.name: Okta
programs.scope_summary: Cloud Identity and Mobility Management Service

programs.name: Opera
programs.scope_summary: Web: auth.opera.com, www.opera.com, accounts.opera.com, flow.opera.com, download.opera.com. Desktop: Opera, Opera GX, Opera Neon, Opera Air browsers. Mobile: Opera Mini, Opera for Android/iOS, Opera GX mobile. APIs and GameMaker.
programs.notes: 336 vulnerabilities rewarded. Validation in ~12 days. High-impact: leak of end-user personal data from production servers ($5,000-$10,000).

programs.name: SEEK
programs.scope_summary: Web: *.seek.com, *.employer.seek.com, *.jobsdb.com, *.jobstreet.com, *.seekpass.co. API: graphql.seek.com, auth.seek.com, *.jobapi.net. Mobile: SEEK iOS/Android, SEEK Pass iOS/Android.
programs.notes: 403 vulnerabilities rewarded. No automated tools. No AI-generated reports. Test job posts must use specific template.

programs.name: Safety Bug Bounty (OpenAI)
programs.scope_summary: OpenAI products - safety and abuse issues (complements security bug bounty)
programs.notes: Focus on safety & abuse risks to OpenAI users

programs.name: iRobot
programs.scope_summary: Web: irobot.com properties. API: aspen-ecommerce-prod.iot.irobotapi.com. Mobile: Roomba Home iOS/Android. Hardware: Roomba robots. Cloud APIs.
programs.notes: Manual testing strongly encouraged - no automated scanners. Focus on cross-user vulnerabilities (affecting other customers' robots).

programs.name: Cloudinary
programs.scope_summary: Web: cloudinary.com/console. API: api.cloudinary.com, res.cloudinary.com. Tier II: mediaflows.cloudinary.com, dimensions.cloudinary.com.
programs.notes: Extraordinary submissions for RCE, business logic bypasses, major operational failures. No automated scanners.

programs.name: Aiven
programs.scope_summary: Cloud data infrastructure (Kafka, PostgreSQL, MySQL, OpenSearch, etc.)

programs.name: Afterpay
programs.scope_summary: Web: afterpay.com, portal.afterpay.com, clearpay.co.uk. API: mobileapi.afterpay.com, portalapi.*.afterpay.com. Mobile: Afterpay iOS/Android, Clearpay iOS/Android.
programs.notes: Also covers Clearpay (UK) brand. Includes developer portals.

programs.name: Acorns
programs.scope_summary: Web: acorns.com, gohenry.com, pixpay.fr. API: graphql.acorns.com. Mobile: Acorns iOS/Android.

programs.name: Arlo
programs.scope_summary: Web: *.arlo.com, my.arlo.com. API: myapi.arlo.com, mcs.arlo.com, partnerapi.arlo.com. Mobile: Arlo Secure iOS/Android, Arlo Safe iOS/Android. IoT devices.

programs.name: Asana
programs.scope_summary: Web: app.asana.com, asana.com, form.asana.com, *.asana.biz. Mobile: Asana iOS/Android. Desktop app.

programs.name: Recorded Future
programs.scope_summary: Recorded Future threat intelligence platform - web, API, mobile
programs.notes: NEW (Mar 2026) - Managed Bug Bounty Engagement. Threat intelligence company.

intigriti.note: Full list spans 7 pages. Programs listed below include both Bug Bounty (paid) and VDP (unpaid) programs. Focus on Bug Bounty programs with clear payout ranges.

programs.name: Coveo Public Bug Bounty
programs.scope_summary: AI-powered search & recommendations platform. Python execution & GenAI attack surface.
programs.notes: Interesting attack surface including Python execution and GenAI features

programs.name: ICI PARIS XL
programs.scope_summary: Retail (AS Watson group) - Hybris/SAP CMS. NL, BE, LU markets.
programs.notes: Part of AS Watson group. Same codebase across multiple programs - duplicate issues treated as single finding across programs.

programs.name: The Perfume Shop
programs.notes: AS Watson group. Same codebase caveat applies.

programs.name: Marionnaud
programs.notes: AS Watson group.

programs.name: Superdrug

programs.scope_summary: Retail (AS Watson group) - NL & BE (Kruidvat & Trekpleister)

programs.name: Watsons
programs.scope_summary: Retail (AS Watson group) - Asia & Europe online/offline. Includes PNS Hong Kong, Fortress, LookAtMe Philippines, Drogas, Moneyback loyalty program.

programs.name: Trusted Firmware (Arm)
programs.scope_summary: Arm secure software reference implementations: TF-A, TF-M, OP-TEE, Mbed TLS
programs.notes: Highest reward range on Intigriti. Related to Arm's own bug bounty program.

programs.name: Altera
programs.notes: NEW (Nov 2024). High max payout of $30,000. AI/software company.

programs.notes: Added Jul 2023. Electric vehicle manufacturer.

programs.name: Intel

yeswehack.note: European-focused bug bounty platform. All programs listed are public and accept submissions from registered hunters. Programs sorted by activity.

top_recommendations.criteria: Programs with clear scope, paid bounties, no strict Signal requirements, and good payout potential

bugcrowd.name: Okta
bugcrowd.reason: Best max payout, identity/access management - broad attack surface

bugcrowd.name: Zendesk
bugcrowd.reason: Excellent max payout, well-known SaaS platform

bugcrowd.name: T-Mobile
bugcrowd.reason: Highest potential payout, massive scope including web/API/mobile

bugcrowd.name: Pinterest
bugcrowd.reason: Clear scope, multiple attack surfaces, high payouts

intigriti.name: Trusted Firmware (Arm)
intigriti.reason: Highest payout on Intigriti, clear scope

intigriti.name: AS Watson Group (6 programs)
intigriti.reason: Multiple related programs, same codebase - efficient testing

intigriti.name: Coveo
intigriti.reason: Interesting AI attack surface, unique scope

yeswehack.name: Swiss Post - E-Voting
yeswehack.reason: Highest bounty on any platform, critical infrastructure

yeswehack.name: YesWeHack (own)
yeswehack.reason: Platform's own program - likely fast triage

yeswehack.name: Ant Group SRC
yeswehack.reason: New program with 0 reports - first-mover advantage
